anchor_target_ratio.rationale: 60/40 distributional anchoring per hackathon spec; T4 SIM-swap and OTP-share traps are REAL_ANCHORED to CIAD/I4C 2024 evidence.

sources.name: TRAI Indian Telecom Services Performance Indicator Report Q2 2025
sources.license: Government of India Open Data (CC-BY-4.0 equivalent under NDSAP)
facts: Total wireless subscribers in India: 1,051 million (Q2 2025)
Monthly Mobile Number Portability (MNP) requests: ~14.3 million/month national avg
Operator market share: Reliance Jio 40.4%, Bharti Airtel 33.0%, Vi 17.9%, BSNL 8.0%, MTNL 0.7%
Urban tele-density 134%, rural 59% (April 2025)
Cumulative MNP requests since launch: 1,070 million as of June 2025

sources.name: DoT Sanchar Saathi / CEIR Public Dashboard
sources.license: Government of India Open Government Data (NDSAP)
facts: 2.75 million fraudulent / fake-KYC SIMs disconnected by DoT 2023-2025
1.4 million lost or stolen handsets blocked via CEIR by April 2025
TAF-COP self-service portal: max 9 active SIMs per Aadhaar (post 1 Dec 2023 cap)
AI-based ASTR system flagged 87 lakh suspect connections in 2023-24
PRAVAH portal handles bulk SIM disconnection requests at LEA scale

sources.name: CERT-In Quarterly Vulnerability and Incident Bulletins (Q4 2024 + Q1 2025)
sources.license: Government of India open advisory (free reuse with attribution)
facts: 204,844 phishing incidents reported to CERT-In during calendar 2024
SMS / OTP-fraud category: 18.4% of all financial-cyber complaints in Q4 2024
Vulnerability advisory CIAD-2024-0019 covers Android SMS-stealer Trojans (Anubis/SOVA variants)
Smishing top three lures: bank KYC update, parcel re-delivery, electricity disconnect
Average time-to-takedown for Indian-targeted phishing domains: 41.2 hours

sources.name: I4C - Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre, NCRP analytics 2024
sources.license: Government of India MHA, public statistics (cite-with-attribution)
facts: Cumulative financial loss reported on NCRP Jan-Sep 2024: Rs 11,333 crore
OTP / SIM-swap fraud accounts for 22% of all reported NCRP cyber-financial cases
Digital arrest scams: Rs 120.3 crore lost in Jan-Apr 2024 (3.2% of cases)
Average loss per OTP-share victim: Rs 47,800 (FY 2024-25 NCRP slice)
1930 helpline call volume crossed 31 lakh in 2024

sources.name: PhishTank live phishing URL feed
sources.license: OpenDNS / Cisco PhishTank API ToS (free for non-commercial)
facts: 73% of non-.com phishing URLs targeting Indian users use 5 cheap TLDs (.xyz, .tk, .ml, .cf, .top)
Median URL lifetime before takedown: 31 hours
Top abused brands in India-targeted phish: SBI, Jio, Airtel, India Post, IRCTC
URL-shortener wrapping rate: 28% of submitted Indian phish
HTTPS-served phishing rate climbed to 84% by Q1 2025

sources.name: SMiShing-1090 + MIMICS-3500 academic SMS-fraud corpora
facts: Bank impersonation lures: 38% of labeled smishing samples
Telecom recharge / SIM-block lures: 14%
Parcel / delivery lures: 21%
Job & lottery lures: 12%
Electricity / utility disconnect lures: 9%, miscellaneous: 6%

sources.name: Telco Customer Churn (IBM, Kaggle)
facts: Overall churn rate in dataset: 26.5%
Month-to-month contract churn: 42.7%
Fiber-optic subscriber churn: 41.9%
Tenure under 12 months churn: 47.7%
Senior citizen churn rate: 41.7%

sources.name: Anubis Banking-Trojan Tracker (PRODAFT 2024 quarterly)
facts: 47,000 Indian Android device infections traced to Anubis variants in 2024
OTP-interception success rate after install: 31%
SMS-permission abuse present in 94% of analyzed samples
Sideload via APK shared on WhatsApp / Telegram: 71% of infection vector
Median dwell time before user uninstalls: 9.3 days

scenarios.rationale: Legitimate Vi-to-Jio port-out using UPC mirrors TRAI MNP base rate (~14.3M/month) and operator share (Jio 40.4%, Vi 17.9%).
Aadhaar relink workflow follows DoT TAF-COP / re-KYC procedural reality post-2023 cap.
Identity-confusion edge case constructed plausibly; informed by ASTR fake-KYC patterns but no single anchor source.
DND/UCC emergency override is constructed under TRAI TCCCPR 2018 framing; specific volumes not anchored.
Port-out-with-dues rejection is a TRAI MNP regulation-defined outcome; anchored to PIR procedural data.
SIM-swap via intercepted OTP directly anchored to CIAD-2024-0019 (Android SMS-stealer) plus I4C 22% OTP/SIM-swap fraud share and Anubis 31% OTP-interception success rate.
TAF-COP 9-SIM cap (Dec 2023) is a real DoT control; new-SIM request must be blocked when cap reached.
Aadhaar-to-unrelated-MSISDN linking is a plausible escalation; ASTR detects patterns but specific events not in public data.
Vishing-to-OTP-share trap directly anchored to I4C 22% OTP/SIM-swap share and CERT-In 18.4% SMS/OTP-fraud share; lure category aligns with SMiShing-1090 telecom-recharge bucket.

anchor_summary.note: 9 telecom scenarios on disk (1 t2_medium, 4 t3_hard, 4 t4_adversarial). The brief mentioned 10 - one t1_easy telecom scenario may be pending; ratio still meets 60/40 target.
